name: Tg Ai Mention Bot
description: Telegram Group AI Mention and Mass Tagging Bot powered by Gemini AI. Tag all members or admins with custom styles and AI responses.

TELEGRAM_TOKEN.description: 🤖 BotFather se mila hua aapka Telegram Bot Token. (@BotFather par /newbot se milega)

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: 🧠 Google AI Studio se mili hui free Gemini API Key. (https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey)

OWNER_ID.description: 👑 Aapka Telegram User ID (int format). Bot.py me comments dekhen ya @MissRose_bot par /id likhkar check karein.

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: 🚀 Jo app naam aap Heroku par rakh rahe hain (wahi same yahan likhein). Example: my-telegram-bot

SUPPORT_LINK.description: 📢 Aapka Telegram Channel ya Support Group ka link. Example: https://t.me/yourgroup

PORT.description: 🔌 Heroku server port (default: 8443). Usually don't change this.
